title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index

items.title: Pressure Index 53/100 (building)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 53/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.
